name: pathology
_note: SYNTHETIC geometry pathologies, each from a documented real-world failure mode (origin cited per entry). WKT is used so open-ring / self-crossing cases (not valid GeoJSON) are representable; see manifest.json.

entries.origin: GPS drift on a hand-walked perimeter
entries.rationale: Self-intersecting figure-8 ring: signed area ~0 and ST_MakeValid(method=structure) fragments it into a 2-part MultiPolygon, so area is not meaningfully preserved; per the AUTO_FIXED-only-if-area-unchanged-within-epsilon gate (policy repair_area_epsilon_frac, tripwire F) this escalates to NEEDS_REVIEW rather than being silently auto-fixed.

entries.origin: digitizing -- last vertex not snapped to first
entries.rationale: Ring not closed; closing the ring is a safe, area-preserving repair.
entries.note: WKT shown with an open ring on purpose (not valid OGC WKT).

entries.rationale: Axis order ambiguous; not safely auto-correctable -> escalate.

entries.origin: CRS confusion -- coordinates in EPSG:3857 metres, declared 4326
entries.rationale: Values are Web Mercator metres, not degrees; CRS must be confirmed.

entries.origin: GPS logger emitted repeated fixes while stationary
entries.rationale: Repeated vertices are dropped on cleaning; geometry unchanged.

entries.origin: single bad GPS fix -- a far-flung spike vertex
entries.rationale: A spike changes area materially; not a safe auto-repair -> review.
Degenerate zero-area ring; cannot compute area/coverage -> review.

entries.origin: near-collinear digitizing of a field edge
entries.rationale: Sub-pixel sliver; area unreliable for the 4-ha format test.

entries.origin: two digitized parcels merged with overlap
entries.rationale: Overlapping parts unioned by ST_MakeValid; area recomputed and recorded.
Longitude sign flips the point out of Vietnam; geocode must be confirmed.

entries.origin: GPS digitizing glitch -- stylus briefly touched the ring boundary mid-edge
entries.rationale: ST_MakeValid removes a zero-area spur; geodesic area unchanged within epsilon -> AUTO_FIXED (the safe-repair counterexample to the bowtie).
